text: Hey Stephanie, I'm recording this video to describe how it works so that you have a record of it. So before using we, I mean we may usually have some information, some data here on all three tabs. So we need to click on clear all sheets here. And after that we are ready to paste new report. Right. So what I'm going to do is I'm going to use today's example. So we had. This is the Amazon open order report that you downloaded. I'm going to paste them here. And one important note is we can do this directly from the.txt file that Amazon gives us. No need to paste it on a different Excel file that will rather harm us. So that if we do that then this file will not work. So we should copy and paste directly from the. TXT file. All right. And the next step is to go to this warehouse report. What I'm going to do is I'm going to copy the data from the this tracking report and I'm going to paste them here. And all we need to do after that is we need to click on process. That's it. Then it's going to take some time. I'm going to pause the video for a while and come back. Now it has been processed. All we have to do is. Okay, before copying and pasting we have to. Even if we keep these, these will not be processed. It will just show some, some error. But we can also take some time to go for the lines and see which ones are best way. All right, we can just delete them. I can also do one thing. If it is absolutely not necessary to keep these in this final sheet, I can automatically delete them. But anyway, for now what we have is we have to delete them. So I'm going to delete that. And that's all. Pretty much everything else has been taken care of. All we have to do is we have to copy from here. And you know, we have to download the shipping confirmation file, show you from Fire because it's not for you. Right. So it's for someone else hopefully. Anyway, so we have to go to upload order related files and from there you see here download template. And we have to download the template from there and just paste all these information from here. Actually we don't need to paste this one. You just need to paste from here. Okay, that's all. And then upload it on Amazon here. So that's all. Thanks for watching.
